Olena Vlasiuk, Ph. D.

About Me Experience Expertise Education

OWL Solution

I co-founded and strategically leads the development of an IoT platform focused on sensor-based automation in domains such as agriculture, energy, and environmental monitoring. Her key contributions include:

- Leading system design workshops and coordinating a cross-border technical team;

- Defining technical priorities and the integration roadmap for real-time sensor data pipelines;

- Applying doctoral-level expertise in computer since to architect reliable, efficient edge-to-cloud data flows.

I played a central role in shaping the modular structure of the platform, enabling smart control logic based on diverse sensor inputs.

All products are developed under the umbrella of Targeted Solutions for Business LLC — my holding company for tech innovation and applied R&D.

OWL Solution launching soon
Smarter systems through sensors and edge-cloud logic.
Co-Founder & Strategic Lead (2024–Present)
